fundamentals.long_business_summary: E & E Enterprises Limited, a non-banking finance company, engages in the lending business. The company was formerly known as The Swastik Safe Deposit and Investments Limited and changed its name to E & E Enterprises Limited in October 2025. The company was incorporated in 1940 and is based in Mumbai, India. E & E Enterprises Limited operates as a subsidiary of Piramal Corporate Services Private Limited.
